calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Hugo Sandoval.
Attorney, John P Zanghi is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lisa Sanchez is present and appearing in Pro Per.
Attorney, Erin Katayam is representing the defendant.
The Judge Pro Tem R. Pasquali, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of October 28, 2013 is vacated.
